title: graphify x obsidian is a cheat code
summary: Chase AI discusses Graphify integrated with Obsidian as a powerful combination for knowledge management. The pairing is presented as a significant productivity advantage for users of the note-taking and knowledge graph platform.
writeup: Chase AI covers the integration of Graphify with Obsidian, framing the pairing as a productivity advantage for knowledge management. The video positions the combination as a way to extend Obsidian's note-taking and knowledge graph features through Graphify. The takeaway: connecting the two tools strengthens workflows for users already building knowledge graphs in Obsidian.
